description: The CLI now automatically generates an HTTPS developer certificate in non-interactive mode when none exists, fixing startup failures for TypeScript and other polyglot AppHosts that cannot rely on `dotnet run` to trigger first-run certificate generation. The DashboardServiceHost scheme resolution is also fixed to correctly default to HTTPS. Certificate generation can be disabled by setting `ASPIRE_CLI_GENERATE_HTTPS_CERTIFICATE=false`.
name: Auto-generate HTTPS dev cert for non-.NET AppHosts
